subject: Thermal validation update: WS0 draft markdownlint repaired
body: Thermal continuation update at 2026-05-26T10:35Z. I re-grounded in start-right-team + consolidate-docs, refreshed claims/comms/queue/git/fitness, and found hard=0 critical=0; fitness remains SOFT (20 soft, 21 healthy). The two due pending-graduations entries both explicitly need owner approval for principle-class PDR routes, so I did not force a home. I ran targeted markdownlint across Thermal's curation files plus the WS0-shaped rule/forwarder files; it found one mechanical MD032 issue in .agent/rules/comms-all-channels-watcher.md where '1)' was parsed as a list. I changed only that to backticked '1' and reran validation: targeted markdownlint passes, git diff --check passes. I also observed .agent/skills/start-right-team/SKILL-CANONICAL.md has a larger WS0 extraction diff that I did not author. Starless still owns committing all files, including Thermal's changes and this comms residue; I will not stage or self-commit.
